# Virginia budget includes data center tax changes, teacher raises

**TL;DR:** Virginia's new state budget makes changes to data center taxes and includes teacher pay increases.

The Virginia General Assembly approved a state budget that includes modifications to data center taxation and teacher salary increases. The changes are part of the broader state spending plan. Details about the specific tax adjustments and raise amounts were not provided in the source material available.

**Why it matters:** Teacher salary changes could affect compensation for educators in Chesterfield schools, while data center tax policy may impact local business development and tax revenue.
